nasb.text: may be able to comprehend with all the saints what is the breadth and length and height and depth,

esv.text: may have strength to comprehend with all the saints what is the breadth and length and height and depth,

cnv.text: 就能和眾聖徒一同領悟基督的愛是多麼的長闊高深，

ccb.text: 以便能够与众圣徒一同领悟基督的爱是多么长阔高深，

csbs.text: 好让你们有能力与所有圣徒一起了解基督的爱是多么长、阔、高、深——
